notes: Photo-trace edge map with noisy stipple that captures a rough body outline but loses the two long tentacles and clean FAO ink-plate restraint.
specific_issues: both long tentacles from the photo are missing
arms merge into an undifferentiated blob with no individuation
no almond eye with pupil — eye area is just edge noise
stipple is uniform photo-noise rather than chromatophore fields
mantle outline is jagged/broken rather than a single clean ink contour
fin shape distorted — left edge drawn as a pointed wedge unlike the photo's rounded fin lobe
double-line outlines from edge detection instead of single-weight ink
reads as auto-traced bitmap, not a scientific plate
